chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 371 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection at A 2. For hearing of Main Case 08.12.2023: M/s. Liaquat Ali Khan and Shafiq Ahmed Advocates along with Applicant Mr. Noor Muhammad Advocate for the Respondent No.5 Mr. Zahoor Shah Additional Prosecutor General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Applicant can provide information of any offence, which he believes to be correct, to the police station having the requisite jurisdiction in the matter. The Complainant will be heard in a professional and polite manner by the SHO. It will be the primary duty of the police to determine whether the information provided discloses the commission of an offence or not, if the information provided is correct and true, and if it is, whether it discloses the commission of a cognizable or non-cognizable offence. The police may then proceed further in accordance with law. It is clarified that this order should not be interpreted as mandatory directions for lodging an F.I.R. All that the police are directed to ensure is compliance with the law. Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE
